title: Dragging a pill crashes the site
symptoms: dragging an event pill can crash the page
calendar may disappear after drag attempt
expected_behavior: dragging should not crash the page
drag should either move the event or fail safely
repro_steps: drag the event pill titled 'Drag Crash Pill' to the next day
notes: watch pageerror and console error events during drag

title: Hover card date range does not match multi-day pill span
symptoms: hover card can show a time range that drops the ending date
timed event crosses into the next day but text only shows one date
expected_behavior: hover card should show both the start date and the end date when they differ
displayed range should match the event span shown in the calendar
repro_steps: click the event titled 'Cross-Day Hover Range'
compare the hover card range with the event span
notes: current regression test is marked test.fail until the bug is fixed

title: Mobile event pills lose visible text
symptoms: event pills render without readable words in mobile month view
expected_behavior: visible mobile pills should keep readable title text
repro_steps: inspect the event titled 'Mobile Pill Text'
notes: current regression test is marked test.fail until the bug is fixed

title: Edit pen does not always open the editor
symptoms: clicking the hover-card edit pen can fail to open the editor
expected_behavior: edit pen should open the event editor every time
editor should be populated with the clicked event
repro_steps: click the event titled 'Edit Pen Fixture'
notes: verify the title field contains the source event title
